placebo_group.description: Placebo group data: 73 children, 2 discharged at first examination (3%), with reported 95% CI of -1% to 6%. The answer critiques the impossible negative lower limit of this CI.

prednisolone_group.description: Prednisolone group data: 67 children, 20 discharged at first examination (30%), with reported 95% CI of 19% to 41%. The answer uses both groups' proportions to compute the difference in proportions (16% to 39%).
